document-annotations.text: pH must be between 5-9 before disposal
document-annotations.comment: Need to verify pH testing procedures are documented in SOP. Current policy doesn't specify testing frequency or responsible personnel.
Container labeling requirements need clarification - should include date, responsible person, and hazard classification per new EHS guidelines.

document-annotations.text: Emergency pickup available for urgent situations
document-annotations.comment: Define what constitutes 'urgent situation' - recommend adding specific criteria and escalation matrix.
